title: Dittofeed
description: Open-source customer engagement and marketing automation platform for building messaging campaigns and user journeys across email, SMS, and push.
installation: Dittofeed is a multi-service stack. This template runs the all-in-one dittofeed/dittofeed-lite image (API + dashboard + worker in one process) on port 3000 in single-tenant mode. It needs two operator add-ons (Postgres + ClickHouse, both provisioned here) AND an external Temporal cluster, which is NOT an available add-on: deploy Temporal separately (image temporalio/auto-setup:1.22.4 with its own Postgres, plus optional temporalio/ui:2.22.1) and point TEMPORAL_ADDRESS at it (default temporal:7233). For production scale you may instead run the split images dittofeed/api, dittofeed/dashboard, and dittofeed/worker (worker handles the Temporal-driven journey processing) rather than the lite bundle; blob storage (any S3/MinIO) is optional. BOOTSTRAP=true auto-creates the default workspace and tables on first start. ROTATE before exposing: SECRET_KEY (openssl rand -base64 32), the admin PASSWORD env, plus the Postgres and ClickHouse add-on passwords. Set DASHBOARD_API_BASE / dashboard URLs to your public host. CLICKHOUSE_HOST must be the full http://host:8123 URL.
